items.title: Completion gate: launch Yes& Chains on app sites (PWA store listings; TWA for Play Store, iOS install guidance). One of two items between 92% and done.
Completion gate: implement subscriptions billing, then flip CHAINS_VISIBLE (Decision 28, src/caddy.ts) to enable the AI caddy. Second of two items between 92% and done.
Completion gate: most art assets outstanding after the native-3D rework. Inventory gaps via the GDD Assets tab + docs/ASSETS.md, then queue Midjourney batches per the personalization standard.
Completion gate: BR asset production pass, same shape as HBH's but after the M1 survival loop lands (M1 is the blocking gate at 40%).

The handler-audit skill (skills/handler-audit/SKILL.md) hard-codes only four handlers and two pre-rename paths: X:\HereThereBeHordes (now X:\HereBeHordes) and X:\Scheduler (now X:\YesAndScheduler, per

BR best-practices P1: replace the per-tile immediate-mode ground render in iso_grid.gd (_draw_ground / _draw_ground_chunks / _draw_centered_texture) with a Godot TileMapLayer + TileSet, BR256Grass aut

BR best-practices P1: convert per-frame group polling to event/tick. ~54 global.get_cached_nodes_in_group() + 8 raw get_nodes_in_group() drive _process loops walking units/enemies/buildings groups eve

BR best-practices P2: move enemy/building stat tables to .tres Resources (EnemyData.NUMBERS + per-subclass _ready stat sets); collapse hand-mirrored constants (SPRITE_SCALE/FRAMES_PER_ROW across const
BR best-practices P3: author a Main -> World + GUI baseline scene and move static level assembly out of gameplay.gd (currently instantiates the whole game in code). s3/s10.
BR best-practices P3: decompose god-objects gameplay.gd (3414L), hud.gd (2381L), iso_grid.gd (2501L) along responsibility seams. s1.
BR best-practices P3: stand up Git LFS for binary art (*.png, audio, models) + .gitattributes EOL normalization BEFORE the real art set lands. s12. NOTE: git/shell ops - must be greenlit.
